dashboard.label: Quality & Hygiene
dashboard.description: Does the MCP user write good SPL? Anti-pattern surfacing, breakdown, and offending queries.

span.title:
Risky queries % = share of MCP queries that reach the MEDIUM band or higher (risk_score ≥ 3), over all MCP queries in the range. 0% = clean.
Per-query risk_score weights: | outputcsv / outputlookup / collect / sendemail / delete +15 (agent intent: data export or destruction — single fire = CRITICAL) index=* +5 dbinspect index=* +4 wide time window (≥30d) +3 len(_raw) +1 no time bound +0 (detected but not scored: MCP passes time range as API param, not in SPL text) bonus: off-hours & risky +2 bonus: >100k rows & risky +5
Bands: CRIT ≥15 · HIGH ≥8 · MED ≥3 · LOW ≥1 (severity in the Risk band distribution panel).

search.query: eval _r=if(risk_score>=3,1,0) | stats count as total sum(_r) as risky | eval pct=if(total>0,round(100*risky/total),0) | fields pct

panel.title: Queries with at least one hit

search.query: stats sum(risk_score) as score by user | sort - score | head 1 | fields user

where risk_band != "NONE" | eval rank = case(risk_band="CRITICAL",4, risk_band="HIGH",3, risk_band="MEDIUM",2, risk_band="LOW",1, true(),0) | stats max(rank) as r | eval band = case(r=4,"CRITICAL", r=3,"HIGH", r=2,"MEDIUM", r=1,"LOW", true(),"NONE") | fields band

stats sum(is_wildcard_index) as wildcard_index, sum(is_len_raw) as len_raw, sum(is_dbinspect_all) as dbinspect_all, sum(is_no_time_bound) as no_time_bound, sum(is_overly_wide_time) as wide_time_window, sum(is_export_or_delete) as export_or_delete | transpose | rename column as anti_pattern, "row 1" as hits | eval anti_pattern = case(anti_pattern=="wildcard_index", "index=*", anti_pattern=="len_raw", "len(_raw)", anti_pattern=="dbinspect_all", "dbinspect index=*", anti_pattern=="no_time_bound", "no time bound", anti_pattern=="wide_time_window", ">30d window", anti_pattern=="export_or_delete", "| outputcsv / | delete (export/destroy)", true(), anti_pattern) | sort - hits
where risk_score > 0 | stats sum(risk_score) as score by user | sort - score

where risk_score > 0 | eval band_rank = case(risk_band="CRITICAL",1, risk_band="HIGH",2, risk_band="MEDIUM",3, risk_band="LOW",4) | stats count by risk_band band_rank | sort band_rank | fields risk_band count
where risk_score > 0 | eval bucket = if(is_off_hours = 1, "off-hours", "business-hours") | stats count by bucket
where risk_score > 0 | stats count, max(risk_score) as max_score, values(risk_band) as risk_bands by spl_body | sort - max_score - count | head 20
